title: olearia ramulosa var. stricta
intro: Olearia ramulosa var. stricta, also known as the bushy tree daisy, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, stems, and flowers, which contain bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is said to have health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Olearia ramulosa var. stricta are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
